violations.quote: Vendor will defend and indemnify Customer against third-party claims alleging that the services or Deliverables infringe intellectual property rights or that Vendor's performance violates applicable law.
Vendor will process Customer Data only to provide and support the services, to comply with Customer's documented instructions, and as otherwise expressly authorized in an Order Form.
Each Order Form has the initial term stated in it and will not automatically extend unless Customer signs a renewal order or gives written approval for a renewal period of one year or less.
